title: Nexter
description: Optimizes vanilla minecraft for better user experience
body:
Experience Minecraft the way it was meant to be – smoother, faster, and more beautiful.
Nexter is a lightweight Fabric modpack designed to optimize performance and visuals without changing core gameplay. Perfect for players who love the vanilla experience but want higher FPS, better lighting, faster loading, and smarter optimizations.

Features:

⚙️ Performance Boosts: Includes Sodium, Lithium and other core performance mods.

🚀 Faster Loading: Improved startup times and world generation.

🧠 Smart Tweaks: Small quality-of-life improvements (Zoom key, World map).

💻 Optimized for Low-End PCs: Runs smoothly even on 4GB RAM setups.

Perfect for:
Players who love the vanilla Minecraft feel but want a modern, lag-free experience.
No unnecessary content – just optimization, stability, and beauty.
